skills.name: testing-pyramid-team
skills.short_desc:
WHAT: 5-role multi-level testing strategy team (Code Analyst + Unit/Integration/E2E Architects + Synthesizer) that builds a balanced test pyramid for untested mission-critical repos.
WHEN: Building a safety net for mission-critical but untested repositories where test coverage gaps pose production risk.
Do NOT use for rapid UI prototypes, simple scripts, or projects where full test infrastructure is premature overhead.
skills.detail_desc:
# Testing Pyramid Team

A 5-role team that builds a comprehensive multi-level testing strategy following the test pyramid principle (70% unit, 20% integration, 10% E2E). This team solves the **parallel decomposition gain** failure mode: three test architects work concurrently on distinct layers, preventing single-agent bias toward any one testing approach. It also solves the **specialization pipeline** failure mode: code analysis must complete before architects design, and synthesis must wait for all architects.

Inspired by the practical test pyramid methodology from Martin Fowler's article on agile testing practices.

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: check dependencies** — read [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) and verify each skill/tool availability. Report missing items to user. User decides go/no-go. The team can run on inline-persona-only mode if all skills are missing.

1. **Code Analysis (Stage 1)** — code-analyst receives codebase path, analyzes structure, identifies module clusters, dependency graph, high-risk zones, and testability assessment. Output: Codebase Map with Verdict. Quality gate: Verdict must be GO, output must contain all 5 mandatory sections. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 1 for gate details.

2. **Parallel Test Architect Dispatch (Stage 2)** — Leader dispatches unit-test-architect, integration-test-architect, and e2e-test-architect in parallel. Each receives Codebase Map and High-Risk Zones. Each designs test strategy for their assigned layer only. Outputs: Layer-specific test strategies with Verdicts. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 2 for gate details.

3. **Test Strategy Synthesis (Stage 3)** — test-strategy-synthesizer receives all architect outputs, synthesizes into unified strategy with pyramid balance assessment, conflict resolution, coverage gaps, and implementation roadmap. Output: Unified Test Strategy Report. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 3 for gate details.

4. **Final: emit Test Strategy Report** — Leader integrates synthesis output into final report format. Surfaces unresolved conflicts verbatim. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 4 for report format.

## Roles

| id | Purpose | When dispatched | Input | Key dependencies | Role file |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| code-analyst | Analyze codebase structure and identify high-risk zones | Stage 1 (serial, first) | codebase path, focus areas override | ast-analyzer, git, python | [roles/code-analyst.md](roles/code-analyst.md) |
| unit-test-architect | Design unit-level test strategy with mocking requirements | Stage 2 (parallel with integration/e2e) | Codebase Map, High-Risk Zones, Testability Assessment | ensure-test-coverage, python | [roles/unit-test-architect.md](roles/unit-test-architect.md) |
| integration-test-architect | Design integration-level test strategy for module interactions | Stage 2 (parallel with unit/e2e) | Codebase Map, Dependency Graph, High-Risk Zones | data-integrity-guardian, sql-injection-scanner, python | [roles/integration-test-architect.md](roles/integration-test-architect.md) |
| e2e-test-architect | Design end-to-end test strategy for user journeys | Stage 2 (parallel with unit/integration) | Codebase Map, Entry Points, High-Risk Zones | node, npm | [roles/e2e-test-architect.md](roles/e2e-test-architect.md) |
| test-strategy-synthesizer | Synthesize unified test strategy with pyramid balance | Stage 3 (serial, after all architects) | All architect outputs + Codebase Map + High-Risk Zones | none | [roles/test-strategy-synthesizer.md](roles/test-strategy-synthesizer.md) |

> Before dispatching each teammate, read the corresponding role file and extract the `## Inline Persona for Teammate` section — paste it directly into the dispatch prompt. Most adopting agents do NOT auto-load role files for teammates.

## Files

| File | What it contains | When to read |
|---|---|---|
| [workflow.md](workflow.md) | Mermaid diagram, step-by-step protocol, integration rules, Final Report format | Before first dispatch — the complete playbook |
| [bind.md](bind.md) | Resource limits, behavioral constraints, failure handling and degraded modes | When hitting limits, handling failures, or needing degraded-mode rules |
| [roles/*.md](roles/) | Per-role identity, success criteria, output schema, Inline Persona for Teammate | Before dispatching each teammate — extract Inline Persona |
| [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) | External skills and tools required to run | **Startup** — verify deps, report missing items, user decides go/no-go |

skills.name: kami
skills.short_desc:
好内容，值得好版面。Kami 是一套适合 AI 时代的排版设计系统，让文档更清晰好读，也容易记住。
来源：https://github.com/tw93/Kami
skills.detail_desc:
# kami · 紙

**紙 · かみ** - the paper your deliverables land on.

Good content deserves good paper. One design language across eight document types: warm parchment canvas, ink-blue accent, serif-led hierarchy, tight editorial rhythm.

Part of `Kaku · Waza · Kami` - Kaku writes code, Waza drills habits, **Kami delivers documents**.

## Step 1 · Decide the language

**Match the user's language.** Chinese -> `*.html` / `slides.py`. English -> `*-en.html` / `slides-en.py`. Japanese -> CJK path (`.html` / `slides.py`) as best-effort, JP Mincho first, visual QA before shipping. Reference docs are shared English specs.

When ambiguous (e.g. a one-word command like "resume"), ask a one-liner rather than guess.

| User language | HTML templates | Slides template |
|---|---|---|
| Chinese (primary) | `*.html` | `slides.py` |
| English | `*-en.html` | `slides-en.py` |
| Japanese (best-effort) | `*.html` | `slides.py` |
| Other languages (best-effort) | choose CJK or EN path by script coverage, then verify manually | choose `slides.py` or `slides-en.py`, then verify manually |

Always use `CHEATSHEET.md` and `references/*.md` for design, writing, production, and diagram guidance.

## Step 2 · Pick the document type

| User says | Document | CN template | EN template |
|---|---|---|---|
| "one-pager / 方案 / 执行摘要 / exec summary" | One-Pager | `one-pager.html` | `one-pager-en.html` |
| "white paper / 白皮书 / 长文 / 年度总结 / technical report" | Long Doc | `long-doc.html` | `long-doc-en.html` |
| "formal letter / 信件 / 辞职信 / 推荐信 / memo" | Letter | `letter.html` | `letter-en.html` |
| "portfolio / 作品集 / case studies" | Portfolio | `portfolio.html` | `portfolio-en.html` |
| "resume / resume / CV / 简历" | Resume | `resume.html` | `resume-en.html` |
| "slides / PPT / deck / 演示" | Slides | `slides.py` | `slides-en.py` |
| "个股研报 / equity report / 估值分析 / investment memo / 股票分析" | Equity Report | `equity-report.html` | `equity-report-en.html` |
| "更新日志 / changelog / release notes / 版本记录" | Changelog | `changelog.html` | `changelog-en.html` |

> Long deck (>20 slides): also read Deck Recipe (design.md section 8).

If unsure, ask a one-liner about the scenario rather than guess.

### Diagrams (primitives, not a 7th doc type)

When the user asks for **a diagram inside** a long-doc / portfolio / slide (not a standalone document), route to `assets/diagrams/` rather than a template:

| User says | Diagram | Template |
|---|---|---|
| "架构图 / architecture / 系统图 / components diagram" | Architecture | `assets/diagrams/architecture.html` |
| "流程图 / flowchart / 决策流 / branching logic" | Flowchart | `assets/diagrams/flowchart.html` |
| "象限图 / quadrant / 优先级矩阵 / 2×2 matrix" | Quadrant | `assets/diagrams/quadrant.html` |
| "柱状图 / bar chart / 分类对比 / grouped bars" | Bar Chart | `assets/diagrams/bar-chart.html` |
| "折线图 / line chart / 趋势 / 股价 / time series" | Line Chart | `assets/diagrams/line-chart.html` |
| "环形图 / donut / pie / 占比 / 分布结构" | Donut Chart | `assets/diagrams/donut-chart.html` |
| "状态机 / state machine / 状态图 / lifecycle" | State Machine | `assets/diagrams/state-machine.html` |
| "时间线 / timeline / 里程碑 / milestones / roadmap" | Timeline | `assets/diagrams/timeline.html` |
| "泳道图 / swimlane / 跨角色流程 / cross-team flow" | Swimlane | `assets/diagrams/swimlane.html` |
| "树状图 / tree / hierarchy / 层级 / 组织架构" | Tree | `assets/diagrams/tree.html` |
| "分层图 / layer stack / 分层架构 / OSI / stack" | Layer Stack | `assets/diagrams/layer-stack.html` |
| "维恩图 / venn / 交集 / overlap / 集合关系" | Venn | `assets/diagrams/venn.html` |
| "K 线 / candlestick / OHLC / 股价走势 / price history" | Candlestick | `assets/diagrams/candlestick.html` |
| "瀑布图 / waterfall / 收入桥 / revenue bridge / decomposition" | Waterfall | `assets/diagrams/waterfall.html` |

Read `references/diagrams.md` before drawing - it has the selection guide, kami token map, and the AI-slop anti-pattern table. Extract the `<svg>` block from the template and drop it into a `<figure>` inside long-doc / portfolio.

Before drawing, always ask: **would a well-written paragraph teach the reader less than this diagram?** If no, don't draw.

**Auto-select charts from data.** When the content contains numerical data (revenue splits, trends over time, category comparisons), choose the appropriate chart type and embed it. Do not wait for the user to request a specific chart. Selection guide: proportional breakdown -> donut, time series -> line, category comparison -> bar, price history -> candlestick, value decomposition -> waterfall.

## Step 2.1 · Source and material pass

Run this before distilling or filling content when the document depends on facts or materials outside the user's draft. Skip it only for personal drafts where the user already supplied everything needed.

### Source check

Trigger when the document mentions a specific company, product, person, release date, version, funding round, metric, market fact, technical spec, or any current fact likely to change.

- Use primary sources before writing: user-provided material, official site, docs, filings, press release, app store page, or repo release
- Keep a short note of source names and dates for facts that drive the document
- If sources conflict or a fact cannot be checked quickly, ask the user instead of choosing silently
- Avoid current-sounding claims such as "latest", "recent", "new", version numbers, launch dates, or financial figures unless they are checked

### Material check

Trigger when the document is about a company, product, project, venue, or personal brand.

Confirm the materials that make the subject recognizable before layout:

| Need | Required when | Accept |
|---|---|---|
| Logo | Any branded document | User file or official SVG/PNG |
| Product image | Physical product / venue / object | Official image, user image, or marked gap |
| UI screenshot | App / SaaS / website / tool | Current screenshot, official product image, or user capture |
| Brand colors | Branded one-pager / portfolio / deck | Official value, extracted asset value, or keep kami ink-blue |
| Fonts | Only if brand typography matters | Official font, close system fallback, or kami default |

If a required item is missing, use a compact gap table and ask once. Do not replace missing material with generic imagery, approximate logo drawings, or invented values.

## Step 2.5 · Distill raw content (if applicable)

Skip this step if the user already provides structured content (clear sections, bullet points, metrics in place).

When the user hands over **raw material** (meeting notes, brain dump, existing doc in different format, chat transcript, scattered points):

1. **Extract**: pull out every factual claim, number, date, name, source, material reference, and action item
2. **Classify**: map each extract to the target template's sections (see `references/writing.md` for section structure per doc type)
3. **Gap-check**: list what the template needs but the raw content doesn't have - include missing facts, missing proof, and missing materials
4. **Ask once**: share the gap table with the user. Do not guess to fill gaps.

Example gap-check:

| Template needs | Found | Missing |
|---|---|---|
| 4 metric cards | "8 years", "50-person team" | 2 more quantifiable results |
| 3-5 core projects | 2 mentioned | at least 1 more with outcome |
| Materials | logo file provided | product screenshot source |

Then proceed to Step 3 with structured, distilled content.

---

## Step 3 · Load the right amount of spec

Pick the tier that matches the task. Default to the lowest tier that covers the work.

| Tier | When | Read |
|---|---|---|
| **Content-only** | Updating text, swapping bullets, translating an existing doc. CSS stays untouched. | `CHEATSHEET.md` only |
| **Layout tweak** | Adjusting spacing, moving sections, changing font size within spec. CSS touched. | `CHEATSHEET.md` + template (tokens already inline) |
| **New document** | Building from scratch or from raw content. | Full design spec + writing spec + template |
| **Sources / materials** | Company, product, market, launch, funding, specs, or branded subject. | `writing.md` source rules + user/source material |
| **Deck (>20 slides)** | Long presentation needing Part Divider, Code Cards, section headers. | Full design spec + Deck Recipe (design.md section 8) |
| **Troubleshoot** | Rendering bug, font issue, page overflow. | `production.md` (+ design spec if CSS is the cause) |
| **Diagram** | Embedding SVG in a doc. | `diagrams.md` only (has its own token map) |

You can always escalate mid-task if the work turns out to need more than the initial tier.

The full spec files for reference:
- Design: `references/design.md`
- Writing: `references/writing.md`
- Production: `references/production.md`
- Diagrams: `references/diagrams.md`

## Step 4 · Fill content into the template

- Copy the template into your working directory; don't write HTML from scratch
- **CSS stays untouched**, only edit the body
- Content follows `writing.md`: data over adjectives, distinctive phrasing over industry clichés
- **Before filling, read the quality bar for your document type** in `writing.md` section "Quality bars by document type". Structure is necessary but not sufficient: a resume bullet needs Action + Scope + Result + Business Outcome; an equity report needs variant perception + quantified catalysts; slides need assertion-evidence titles. Meeting the quality bar is as important as filling every placeholder.

### Fill PDF metadata (WeasyPrint reads these into the PDF)

Every template has meta placeholders in `<head>`. Fill all four before building:

| Placeholder (CN) | Placeholder (EN) | Rule |
|---|---|---|
| `{{作者}}` | `{{AUTHOR}}` | Resume/letter/portfolio: use the person's name from the doc. All others: leave as-is (build script infers from git config or env) |
| `{{摘要}}` | `{{DESCRIPTION}}` | Extract one sentence (≤150 chars) from the first 2 paragraphs |
| `{{关键词}}` | `{{KEYWORDS}}` | 3-5 keywords from the title + section headings, comma-separated |
| `{{文档标题}}` / `{{信件主题}}` etc. | `{{DOC_TITLE}}` / `{{LETTER_SUBJECT}}` etc. | Infer from the H1 or `.header .title` text |

`<meta name="generator" content="Kami">` is already fixed in the template; do not change it.

**Author inference**: `build.py` automatically sets PDF `/Author` metadata from:
1. `git config user.name` (primary)
2. `KAMI_AUTHOR` environment variable (fallback)
3. `"Kami"` (final fallback)

For personal documents (resume/letter/portfolio), the HTML `<meta name="author">` should match the person's name in the content. For non-personal documents (one-pager/long-doc), leave the placeholder as-is and let the build script infer it.

## Step 4.5 · Auto-select output format

Do not ask the user which format to export. Decide from context:

| Signal | Output | Why |
|---|---|---|
| Any document request | HTML + PDF | PDF is the default deliverable, HTML is the source |
| Slides / PPT / deck | HTML + PDF + PPTX | Presentations need a projectable format |
| "分享" / "发朋友圈" / "share" / "post" / "preview" | + PNG | Social platforms and messaging need images |
| "嵌入" / "插图" / "embed in another doc" | PNG only | Used as material inside other documents |
| User explicitly says a format | Follow the user | Explicit request overrides auto-selection |

PDF always ships. PPTX follows slides. PNG follows sharing context. The user should never need to think about formats.

## Step 5 · Build & verify

```bash
python3 scripts/build.py --verify           # build all templates + page count + font check + slides
python3 scripts/build.py --verify resume-en # single target full verification
python3 scripts/build.py --verify slides    # single slide deck verification
python3 scripts/build.py --check-placeholders path/to/filled.html
python3 scripts/build.py --check            # CSS rule violations only (fast, no build)
```

Source templates intentionally keep `{{...}}` fields. Run placeholder checks on completed documents, not on the template library.

Visual anomalies (tag double rectangle, font fallback, page break issues) -> `production.md` Part 4.

## Fonts

**Chinese**
- Main serif: TsangerJinKai02-W04.ttf (400 weight) + TsangerJinKai02-W05.ttf (500 weight, real bold)
- Templates use dual @font-face declarations: W04 for body text, W05 for headings
- Both files are commercial fonts. Keep them available in the repository for local preview and CDN fallback, but do not bundle them inside Claude Desktop skill ZIPs
- Fallback chain baked into templates: Source Han Serif SC -> Noto Serif CJK SC -> Songti SC -> STSong -> Georgia

**Japanese (best-effort)**
- Uses CJK template path, no dedicated `-ja` templates yet
- JP Mincho-first stack: YuMincho -> Hiragino Mincho ProN -> Noto Serif CJK JP -> Source Han Serif JP -> TsangerJinKai02 -> serif
- Visually verify line breaks, punctuation rhythm, and emphasis weight before shipping

**English**
- Single serif: Charter (system-bundled, macOS/iOS), used for both headlines and body
- No separate sans: `--sans: var(--serif)`, one font per page
- Fallback: Georgia (cross-platform) / Palatino / Times New Roman

Font files next to HTML with relative `@font-face` paths is the most stable setup. `scripts/package-skill.sh` excludes TsangerJinKai TTFs from the Claude Desktop ZIP.

**Font auto-recovery (Claude Desktop)**

Before building Chinese documents, check font files. If missing, download into `assets/fonts/`:

```bash
# Check
test -f assets/fonts/TsangerJinKai02-W04.ttf || {
  curl -fsSL "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/tw93/Kami@main/assets/fonts/TsangerJinKai02-W04.ttf" \
    -o assets/fonts/TsangerJinKai02-W04.ttf
  curl -fsSL "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/tw93/Kami@main/assets/fonts/TsangerJinKai02-W05.ttf" \
    -o assets/fonts/TsangerJinKai02-W05.ttf
}
```

Run once before building. If network is unavailable, WeasyPrint falls back to Source Han Serif SC.

## Feedback protocol

When the user gives **vague visual feedback** ("looks off", "太挤了", "not elegant"), do not guess. Ask back with current values:

| User says | Ask about |
|---|---|
| "太挤了" / "too cramped" | Which element? Line-height (current: X)? Padding (current: Y)? Page margin? |
| "太松了" / "too loose" | Same direction, reversed |
| "颜色不对" / "color feels wrong" | Which element? Brand blue overused? A gray reading too cool? |
| "不够好看" / "not polished" | Font rendering? Alignment? Whitespace distribution? Hierarchy unclear? |
| "看着不专业" / "unprofessional" | Content wording? Or layout (alignment, consistency)? |

Template response: "X is currently set to Y. Would you like (a) [specific alternative within spec] or (b) [another option]?"

Never say "I'll adjust the spacing" without naming the exact property and its new value.

---

## When not to use this skill

- User explicitly wants Material / Fluent / Tailwind default - different design language
- Need dark / cyberpunk / futurist aesthetic (this is deliberately anti-future)
- Need saturated multi-color (this has one accent)
- Need cartoon / animation / illustration style (this is editorial)
- Web dynamic app UI (this is for print / static documents)

---

Next: **apply Step 3's tier table to decide what to read**, then copy the matching template and start filling.

skills.name: literature-review-team
skills.display_name: 系统性文献综述团队技能
skills.short_desc:
采用 4 角色协作完成系统性文献综述：检索问题建模、证据筛选、质量评估与结论整合。
用于科研立项、策略论证、政策研究前的证据收敛与可信度分级。
不适用于仅需单篇论文速读或非证据型观点写作。
skills.detail_desc:
# 文献综述团队

该团队以“职责分离 + 质量门控”的方式协同完成复杂研究任务，避免单角色在关键判断上同时当运动员和裁判。每个角色只对本阶段产出负责，由 Leader 最终整合为可执行决策包。

## Workflow

0. **前置检查：验证依赖** — 读取 [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml)，确认依赖可用并标注缺失影响。
1. **question-modeler**：把业务问题转成可检索问题框架与纳排边界。
2. **search-curator**：执行检索去重与初筛，形成候选文献池。
3. **quality-rater**：评估研究质量与偏倚风险并完成证据分级。
4. **synthesis-lead**：整合证据冲突并输出可决策结论。
5. **Leader 组装最终交付** — 输出 **文献综述决策包**，包含结论、证据、风险与行动项。

## Roles

| id | 职责 | 何时派发 | 输入 | 关键依赖 | 角色文件 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| question-modeler | 把业务问题转成可检索问题框架与纳排边界。 | 阶段 1 | 任务简报 | literature-review, python | [roles/question-modeler.md](roles/question-modeler.md) |
| search-curator | 执行检索去重与初筛，形成候选文献池。 | 阶段 2 | 阶段 1 输出 | literature-review, python | [roles/search-curator.md](roles/search-curator.md) |
| quality-rater | 评估研究质量与偏倚风险并完成证据分级。 | 阶段 3 | 阶段 2 输出 | literature-review, python | [roles/quality-rater.md](roles/quality-rater.md) |
| synthesis-lead | 整合证据冲突并输出可决策结论。 | 阶段 4 | 阶段 3 输出 | literature-review, python | [roles/synthesis-lead.md](roles/synthesis-lead.md) |

> 派发每位队友前，请先读取对应角色文件中的 `## Inline Persona for Teammate` 段落，
> 并将其原样粘贴到派发提示词中。
> 大多数接入 Agent 不会自动加载角色文件。

## Files

| 文件 | 内容 | 何时读取 |
|---|---|---|
| [workflow.md](workflow.md) | Mermaid 图、完整步骤、门控规则、最终报告模板 | 首次派发前（完整作战手册） |
| [bind.md](bind.md) | 资源限制、行为约束、失败处理与降级机制 | 遇到限制、失败处理或降级执行时 |
| [roles/*.md](roles/) | 各角色身份、成功标准、边界、输出结构、Inline Persona | 派发每个队友前（提取 Inline Persona） |
| [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) | 运行所需技能与工具 | **启动时**（核对依赖并报告缺失，由用户决定是否继续） |

skills.name: mayday-travel-planning-team
skills.short_desc:
五一旅行规划团队：小红书攻略专家 + 携程/去哪儿比价辩论 + 目的地租车规划 + 出行风险预警。
用于规划五一假期的完整旅行方案，包括行程攻略、票务酒店比价、租车路线和风险提示。
不适用于单平台预订、纯攻略生成或紧急旅行安排。

skills.name: health-team
skills.short_desc:
3 阶段流水线（权益分析师 → 证据审查员 → 行动规划师），将消费者纠纷转化为清晰的权益认知、证据强度评估和具体解决步骤。
适用于消费纠纷：商品缺陷、拒绝退款、保修索赔、平台纠纷、订阅陷阱或虚假广告。
不适用于企业间纠纷或复杂诉讼——本技能仅处理日常消费者权益情况。
skills.detail_desc:
# 消费者权益保护团队

一个 3 阶段流水线，通过先理清法律权益、再评估证据、最后规划升级路径，将消费纠纷转化为可操作的解决方案。单个 Agent 处理消费纠纷时要么夸大权益（给出虚假信心），要么在不了解证据情况下就跳到升级步骤，本流水线确保了正确的先后顺序。

## 工作流程

0. **前置检查：验证依赖** — 读取 [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) 并核实。

1. **Leader 收集纠纷背景** — 发生了什么、购买的商品/服务、商家/平台名称、司法管辖区、已尝试过的方式，以及现有文件（收据、订单确认、退款政策、沟通记录）。

2. **阶段 1 — rights-analyzer** 识别适用的消费者法律及消费者有权主张的权益。

3. **阶段 2 — evidence-reviewer** 接收权益分析，评估消费者的证据强度。

4. **阶段 3 — action-planner** 接收权益 + 证据评估，规划附具体话术的升级路径。

5. **最终：输出消费纠纷解决方案** — 权益摘要 + 证据评估 + 分步行动计划。

## 角色

| id | 职责 | 何时派发 | 输入 | 关键依赖 | 角色文件 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| rights-analyzer | 适用法律和消费者权益 | 阶段 1——最先运行 | 纠纷背景 | 无 | [roles/rights-analyzer.md](roles/rights-analyzer.md) |
| evidence-reviewer | 证据质量和缺口评估 | 阶段 2——权益分析完成后 | 权益分析 + 背景 | 无 | [roles/evidence-reviewer.md](roles/evidence-reviewer.md) |
| action-planner | 附话术的升级路径规划 | 阶段 3——证据评估完成后 | 权益 + 证据 + 背景 | 无 | [roles/action-planner.md](roles/action-planner.md) |

> 派发每位队友前，读取对应角色文件并提取 `## Inline Persona for Teammate` 部分——将其直接粘贴进派发提示词。
> 大多数接入 Agent 不会自动加载角色文件。

## 文件

| 文件 | 内容 | 何时读取 |
|---|---|---|
| [workflow.md](workflow.md) | Mermaid 图、流水线步骤、门控、最终报告格式 | 首次派发前 |
| [bind.md](bind.md) | 资源限制、行为约束、失败处理 | 遇到限制时 |
| [roles/*.md](roles/) | 各阶段角色身份、成功标准、输出模式、内联 Persona | 派发每个阶段前 |
| [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) | 运行所需外部 skill 和工具 | **启动时** |

skills.name: bill-analyzer-skill
skills.short_desc: 一个工程化的智能账单分析工具，支持自动识别多种账单格式（飞鸭记账、钱迹等），提供深度收支分析、月度趋势、分类统计和智能洞察。
skills.detail_desc:
# 📊 智能账单分析引擎 (Bill Analyzer Engine)

## 描述
一个工程化的智能账单分析工具，支持自动识别多种账单格式（飞鸭记账、钱迹等），提供深度收支分析、月度趋势、分类统计和智能洞察。

## 触发条件
当用户要求分析账单、查看收支情况、分析消费记录、或提供CSV账单文件时触发。

## 使用方法

### 基本用法
```bash
# 分析飞鸭记账格式
uv run bill-analyzer-skill/scripts/bill_analyzer.py 飞鸭记账.csv

# 分析钱迹格式
uv run bill-analyzer-skill/scripts/bill_analyzer.py QianJi_日常账本_2026-05-05_202340.csv

# 指定日期范围
uv run bill-analyzer-skill/scripts/bill_analyzer.py 飞鸭记账.csv --start-date 2026-01-01

# 输出Markdown格式
uv run bill-analyzer-skill/scripts/bill_analyzer.py 飞鸭记账.csv --output markdown

# 输出JSON格式
uv run bill-analyzer-skill/scripts/bill_analyzer.py 飞鸭记账.csv --output json
```

### 参数说明
| 参数 | 说明 | 默认值 |
|------|------|--------|
| `file` | 账单CSV文件路径 | 必填 |
| `--start-date` | 分析起始日期 (YYYY-MM-DD) | 全部数据 |
| `--end-date` | 分析截止日期 (YYYY-MM-DD) | 全部数据 |
| `--output` | 输出格式: text/json/markdown | text |
| `--detail` | 详细级别: basic/standard/deep | standard |

## 支持格式

### 1. 飞鸭记账格式
```
类型,分类,二级分类,时间,金额,账户,备注
支出,食品,三餐外卖,2026/4/30 9:54,27.4,,午饭
```

### 2. 钱迹格式
```
ID,时间,分类,二级分类,类型,金额,币种,账户1,账户2,备注,...
1,2026/4/30 9:54,食品,三餐外卖,支出,27.4,CNY,支付宝,,午饭
```

### 3. 通用格式
自动识别列名映射，支持多种命名方式。

## 分析功能

### 核心指标
- **真实工资收入**: 排除理财、投资等非工资收入
- **真实生活消费**: 排除储蓄转出等非消费支出
- **储蓄率**: 真实结余 / 真实工资收入
- **月度趋势**: 逐月收支变化
- **分类占比**: 各类消费占比及可视化
- **二级分类**: 食品、交通等大类下的细分

### 智能洞察
- 月度消费占比预警
- 食品/交通支出优化建议
- 储蓄率评估
- 大额医疗支出提醒

## 架构设计

```
bill-analyzer-skill/
├── SKILL.md                    # Skill 定义文件
├── scripts/
│   └── bill_analyzer.py        # 主分析脚本
│       ├── BillAnalyzerConfig  # 配置层
│       ├── FormatDetector      # 格式识别层
│       ├── DataLoader          # 数据加载层
│       ├── BillAnalyzer        # 分析引擎层
│       └── OutputFormatter     # 输出格式化层
├── references/                 # 参考文档
├── assets/                     # 资源文件
└── evals/                      # 评估数据
```

## 注意事项
1. 确保CSV文件路径正确
2. 日期格式支持: YYYY/MM/DD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY年MM月DD日
3. 金额支持正负号和千分位逗号
4. 编码自动检测: UTF-8, GBK, GB2312

skills.name: k12-academic-growth-coach
skills.short_desc:
K12学业成长教练团：先聊情况→试卷分析+各科老师跟学生聊+老师讨论+各科老师集体跟学生确认优先级+习惯老师→班主任跟家长沟通+出全程提升计划。
  有试卷客观诊断薄弱科，没试卷集中攻最差科。各科老师讨论确定提分优先级，集体跟学生确认后班主任跟家长沟通再出全程计划，做任务攒积分拿徽章！
skills.detail_desc:
# K12 学业成长教练团

## 核心理念
- 进步是一步步走出来的，按计划稳步提升
- 你的声音最重要，老师先听你说
- 试卷会说话，上传卷子帮你逐题诊断
- 集中火力：只安排薄弱科老师，不浪费你时间
- 各科老师互相讨论，确定哪科最该提分，精准发力
- 提分优先级要跟你确认，你觉得合理才执行
- 每一分努力都算数，攒积分拿徽章看见成长
- 爸妈也是队友，基于你的反馈精准沟通

## 流程一句话
先问试卷 → 有试卷就客观诊断薄弱科，没试卷就攻最差科 → 各科老师聊 → 老师们讨论提分优先级 → 各科老师集体跟学生确认 → 习惯老师 → 班主任跟家长沟通+出全程计划

详细流程见 [workflow.md](workflow.md)，行为约束见 [bind.md](bind.md)

skills.name: doc-generator
skills.short_desc: 用于指导文档的生成，包含图片。当前多用于jiuwenclaw文档生成
skills.detail_desc:
# 文档生成技能

## 角色

你是一位资深技术文档工程师，擅长为各类用户（从初次使用者到专家）编写清晰、可操作、结构化的指导文档。

## 核心任务

### 1. 询问大纲路径，加载大纲内容

首先询问用户提供大纲文件的路径。支持以下格式：
- Excel 文件（.xlsx）- 使用 pandas 读取
- Markdown 文件（.md）- 直接读取
- JSON 文件（.json）- 解析结构化数据
- CSV 文件（.csv）- 使用 pandas 读取

加载大纲后，解析其结构：
- 模块/章节（一级标题）
- 子模块（二级标题）
- 内容/细分内容（三级及以下标题）
- 知识点（具体指导内容）

### 2. 生成完整指导文档

根据大纲结构和用户要求，生成完整的指导文档（How-to Guide / Instruction Manual）。

**关键原则：**
- 按大纲的层级结构组织文档
- 每个知识点都要写出准确、详细、可操作的指导
- 使用清晰的步骤编号和格式
- 添加必要的示例、表格、提示框

### 3. 信息不足时主动询问

如果用户信息不足，**不要自行臆测**，主动询问以下关键要素：

| 要素 | 询问时机 |
|------|----------|
| **目标受众** | 初学者/中级/专家？影响术语使用和解释深度 |
| **步骤范围** | 需要覆盖哪些操作？是否需要前置条件？ |
| **环境/平台** | Windows/macOS/Linux？影响命令和路径格式 |
| **输出格式** | Markdown/Word/PDF？影响最终交付形式 |
| **语言偏好** | 中文/英文/双语？ |
| **截图需求** | 是否需要配图说明？ |

### 4. 截图支持（Selenium 浏览器自动化）

当文档需要截图说明时，使用 Selenium 自动导航并截图：

**执行步骤：**

1. **确认目标 URL 和导航路径**
   - 询问用户：目标页面 URL（如 `http://localhost:5173/`）
   - 询问用户：需要点击的导航按钮文本（如"技能"、"设置"）

2. **使用 spawn_subagent 执行自动化**
   ```
   通过 spawn_subagent 启动子智能体执行 Selenium 自动化任务
   ```

3. **自动化脚本示例：**
   ```python
   from selenium import webdriver
   from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options
   from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
   import time

   # 配置 Chrome 无头模式
   chrome_options = Options()
   chrome_options.add_argument("--headless")
   chrome_options.add_argument("--window-size=1920,1080")

   driver = webdriver.Chrome(options=chrome_options)

   # 打开目标页面
   driver.get("http://localhost:5173/")

   # 点击导航按钮
   skill_btn = driver.find_element(By.XPATH, "//*[text()='技能']")
   skill_btn.click()
   time.sleep(2)

   # 截图保存
   driver.save_screenshot("skill_page.png")
   driver.quit()
   ```

4. **将截图插入文档**
   - 截图保存到文档的 assets/images 目录
   - 使用相对路径引用：`![描述](../assets/images/截图文件名.png)`

**注意事项：**
- 确保 Selenium 已安装（`pip install selenium`）
- 无头模式执行更快，适合后台任务
- 如果页面需要登录，需先处理登录流程

## 文档格式标准

### 必须遵守的格式要求

1. **结构完整**：所有生成的文档必须包含大纲的全部主题内容，按子模块、内容、细分内容生成文档结构

2. **层级清晰**：
   ```markdown
   # 一级标题（模块/章节）
   ## 二级标题（子模块）
   ### 三级标题（细分内容）
   #### 四级标题（具体步骤/知识点）
   ```

3. **知识点详细**：根据知识点的要求写出准确与详细的指导，包括：
   - 操作步骤（使用编号列表）
   - 参数说明（使用表格）
   - 示例演示（使用代码块或示例框）
   - 注意事项（使用提示框）

4. **Markdown 输出**：以 Markdown 格式输出，便于后续转换和发布

### 推荐的文档模板

```markdown
# [文档标题]

[简短介绍/概述]

---

## [模块一]

### [子模块一]

#### [细分内容一]

**操作步骤：**

1. 第一步：xxx
2. 第二步：xxx
3. ...

**参数说明：**

| 参数 | 说明 | 默认值 |
|------|------|--------|
| xxx  | xxx  | xxx    |

**示例：**

```
示例代码或命令
```

> **提示**：xxx

> **注意**：xxx

---

## [模块二]

...

---

## 附录

### 快速参考

### 常见问题

---

*文档版本：v1.0*
*适用对象：xxx*
*最后更新：YYYY-MM-DD*
```

## 执行流程

1. **接收请求** → 确认用户需要生成文档
2. **询问大纲** → 获取大纲文件路径
3. **加载大纲** → 解析大纲结构和内容
4. **确认需求** → 询问受众、范围、环境等关键要素
5. **生成文档** → 按大纲结构生成完整文档
6. **截图补充** → 如需要，使用 Selenium 自动截图
7. **输出交付** → 保存为 Markdown 文件

## 输出交付

生成的文档默认保存到用户指定位置，或以下默认路径：
```
C:\Users\<用户名>\.jiuwenclaw\service_default\agent_default\agent\jiuwenclaw_workspace\
```

文件命名建议：`<主题>_guide_v1.0.md`

---

## 参考文件

- `references/doc-template.md` - 文档模板详细示例，生成复杂文档时可参考

skills.name: change-management-team
skills.short_desc:
转型管理团队，运用科特八步法设计数字化转型等重大变动的内部沟通与培训方案。
用于引入新系统、调整企业架构、组织重组等转型场景。
不适用于简单的通知发布或单一流程调整。
skills.detail_desc:
# Change Management Team（转型管理推进组）

C+B 混合模式团队：专业化流水线（5阶段顺序执行）+ 并行分解（Stage 2 沟通与阻力并行）。解决单一顾问在转型管理中"规划-沟通-阻力-培训-巩固"各阶段专业深度不足、阶段边界模糊、质量门控缺失的问题。

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: 检查依赖** — 读取 [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) 验证依赖项。报告缺失项：`required: true` 表示执行可能失败；`required: false` 表示降级但可运行。**用户决定**是否继续。团队可在纯 Inline Persona 模式下运行（所有技能缺失时）。

1. **转型规划（Stage 1）** — change-planner 执行。输入：转型背景、组织信息、转型目标。输出：科特八步法路径表、风险预案、成功指标。质量门控：Verdict = READY 且八步法完整。失败 → kick-back，最多重试2次。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 1。

2. **沟通方案 + 阻力分析（Stage 2，并行）** — communication-designer 与 resistance-analyst 并行执行。输入：规划输出。输出：分层沟通方案 + 阻力分析报告。质量门控：沟通 Verdict = COMPLETE；阻力 Verdict ≤ HIGH。若阻力 CRITICAL → 流水线暂停，等待用户确认干预措施。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 2。

3. **培训方案（Stage 3）** — training-coordinator 执行。输入：规划输出 + 阻力分析。输出：能力差距矩阵、分层培训方案、培训后支持机制。质量门控：Verdict = COMPLETE 且能力差距矩阵完整。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 3。

4. **巩固方案（Stage 4）** — consolidation-specialist 执行。输入：所有前序输出。输出：短期胜利巩固机制、回退风险分析、文化嵌入策略、持续监测机制。质量门控：Verdict = COMPLETE 且文化嵌入覆盖三个层面。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 4。

5. **Final: 整合转型管理方案** — Leader 整合五个维度输出，生成完整转型管理推进方案。包含：规划、沟通、阻力应对、培训、巩固、实施建议、风险提示。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Final Report Format。

## Roles

| id | Purpose | When dispatched | Input | Key dependencies | Role file |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| change-planner | 运用科特八步法规划转型路径 | 每次执行，Stage 1 | 转型背景、组织信息、转型目标 | 无 | [roles/change-planner.md](roles/change-planner.md) |
| communication-designer | 设计分层沟通策略 | Stage 2，与阻力分析并行 | 规划输出、组织层级信息 | 无 | [roles/communication-designer.md](roles/communication-designer.md) |
| resistance-analyst | 识别转型阻力类型与根源 | Stage 2，与沟通设计并行 | 规划输出、组织信息 | 无 | [roles/resistance-analyst.md](roles/resistance-analyst.md) |
| training-coordinator | 分析能力差距，设计培训方案 | Stage 3，顺序执行 | 规划输出、阻力分析、组织信息 | 无 | [roles/training-coordinator.md](roles/training-coordinator.md) |
| consolidation-specialist | 设计巩固机制与文化嵌入策略 | Stage 4，顺序执行 | 所有前序输出、组织信息 | 无 | [roles/consolidation-specialist.md](roles/consolidation-specialist.md) |

> Before dispatching each teammate, read the corresponding role file and extract the
> `## Inline Persona for Teammate` section — paste it directly into the dispatch prompt.
> Most adopting agents do NOT auto-load role files for teammates.

## Files

| File | What it contains | When to read |
|---|---|---|
| [workflow.md](workflow.md) | Mermaid 流水线图、详细步骤、质量门控、最终报告格式 | 首次调度前 — 完整执行手册 |
| [bind.md](bind.md) | 资源约束、行为约束、失败处理、降级模式、升级规则 | 触发限制、处理失败、需要降级规则时 |
| [roles/*.md](roles/) | 角色身份、成功标准、输出格式、Inline Persona | 调度每个角色前 — 提取 Inline Persona |
| [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) | 外部技能和工具依赖 | **启动时** — 验证依赖，报告缺失项，用户决定是否继续 |

skills.name: advertising-compliance-team
skills.short_desc: 2角色对抗式广告法审计团队，包含极限词审计专家、真实性核查专家。可扫描广告内容极限词违规、验证宣称真实性，适用于营销活动、电商主图、户外广告发布前合规审查。
skills.detail_desc:
# 广告法合规审计团队

本团队采用对抗模式，由极限词审计和真实性核查两个角色独立审查广告内容的合规状态。

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: check dependencies** — read [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) and verify all items.

1. **Leader: gather context** — collect advertising content, product specifications, and applicable advertising law regulations.

2. **Parallel adversarial audit** — dispatch both roles simultaneously:
   - **limit-word-auditor**: scans for prohibited limit words, extreme claims
   - **truthfulness-checker**: verifies claims against product specs, identifies misleading statements

3. **Leader: integrate findings** — collect outputs, surface contradictions, categorize by violation type.

4. **Final: emit Advertising Compliance Report** — structured report with violations and remediation recommendations.

## Roles

| id | Purpose | When dispatched | Input | Role file |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| limit-word-auditor | Scans for prohibited limit words | Every run, parallel | Advertising content | [roles/limit-word-auditor.md](roles/limit-word-auditor.md) |
| truthfulness-checker | Verifies claim truthfulness | Every run, parallel | Advertising content, product specs | [roles/truthfulness-checker.md](roles/truthfulness-checker.md) |

## Files

| File | What it contains | When to read |
|---|---|---|
| [workflow.md](workflow.md) | Mermaid diagram, protocol, Final Report | Before first dispatch |
| [bind.md](bind.md) | Resource limits, failure handling | When hitting limits |
| [roles/*.md](roles/) | Per-role identity, Inline Persona | Before dispatching |
| [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) | External dependencies | Startup |

skills.name: diataxis-doc-sync-team
skills.short_desc:
WHAT: 5-role automated documentation sync team (4 parallel Diátaxis quadrant extractors + 1 integrator) that syncs code, architecture, and tests to a unified knowledge base.
Use when maintaining large-scale technical documentation that needs systematic coverage across tutorials, how-to guides, reference, and explanation.
Do NOT use for writing marketing brochures, blog posts, or non-technical content.
skills.detail_desc:
# Diátaxis Documentation Sync Team

A 5-role team implementing the Diátaxis documentation framework (https://diataxis.fr/) for automated documentation synchronization. The team uses a **B+C mixed pattern**: parallel decomposition across four Diátaxis quadrants (Tutorials, How-to, Reference, Explanation) followed by a sequential integration stage with quality gates. This solves the single-agent failure mode where documentation extraction lacks breadth coverage and structural coherence.

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: check dependencies** — read [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) and verify.
   Report missing items: `required: true` = likely fails without it; `required: false` = degraded but functional. **User decides** whether to proceed.
   The team can run on inline-persona-only mode if all skills are missing.
   Note: dependencies were populated during authoring via Stage 2 auto-matching (local scan) and optional post-generation community enrichment. Each entry's `source` field indicates origin (`local` or community URL).

1. **Parallel extraction: four Diátaxis quadrants** — Leader dispatches tutorial-sync-agent, howto-sync-agent, reference-sync-agent, and explanation-sync-agent simultaneously. Each agent extracts documentation material from its assigned quadrant. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 1 for full details and [bind.md](bind.md) § Resource Constraints for limits.

2. **Integration: weave four perspectives** — doc-integrator receives outputs from all four quadrant agents, identifies cross-document inconsistencies, proposes unified structure, and validates coverage. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 2 for gate criteria.

3. **Final: emit Documentation Sync Report** — Leader compiles final report with quadrant findings, inconsistencies, coverage map, and recommendations. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) § Final Report Format.

## Roles

| id | Purpose | When dispatched | Input | Key dependencies | Role file |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| tutorial-sync-agent | Extract learning-oriented tutorial material | Every run, parallel with other quadrants | codebase_context, existing_docs | ast-analyzer, tutorial-writer | [roles/tutorial-sync-agent.md](roles/tutorial-sync-agent.md) |
| howto-sync-agent | Extract task-oriented how-to guides | Every run, parallel with other quadrants | codebase_context, existing_docs | ast-analyzer, docs-writer | [roles/howto-sync-agent.md](roles/howto-sync-agent.md) |
| reference-sync-agent | Extract information-oriented API reference | Every run, parallel with other quadrants | codebase_context, existing_docs | ast-analyzer, api-documenter | [roles/reference-sync-agent.md](roles/reference-sync-agent.md) |
| explanation-sync-agent | Extract understanding-oriented explanation | Every run, parallel with other quadrants | codebase_context, architecture_context, existing_docs | ast-analyzer, charts-flow, git | [roles/explanation-sync-agent.md](roles/explanation-sync-agent.md) |
| doc-integrator | Integrate four quadrant outputs | After all quadrant agents complete | tutorial_output, howto_output, reference_output, explanation_output | none | [roles/doc-integrator.md](roles/doc-integrator.md) |

> Before dispatching each teammate, read the corresponding role file and extract the

skills.name: strategic-goal-setting-team
skills.short_desc: 战略目标拆解组。基于 BSC（平衡计分卡）从财务、客户、流程、成长四维度设定目标。用于年度经营计划制定与高层共识达成。不适用于仅记录个人周报内容。
skills.detail_desc:
# Strategic Goal Setting Team

基于 Kaplan & Norton 平衡计分卡（Balanced Scorecard）方法论的战略目标拆解团队。采用 C-pattern（专业化流水线）架构，顺序执行财务、客户、流程、成长四个维度的目标规划，最终由战略整合者构建完整的战略地图。

## Workflow

执行顺序遵循 BSC 因果关系链逻辑：成长 → 流程 → 客户 → 财务。

1. **Pre-flight** — Leader 验证输入完整性
2. **财务维度** — financial-goal-planner 规划财务目标
3. **客户维度** — customer-goal-planner 规划客户目标
4. **流程维度** — process-goal-planner 规划流程目标
5. **成长维度** — growth-goal-planner 规划成长目标
6. **战略整合** — bsc-integrator 构建战略地图、验证因果链、识别冲突
7. **Final Report** — Leader 输出整合目标体系

详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md)。

## Roles

| id | Purpose | Role file |
|---|---|---|
| financial-goal-planner | 规划财务维度目标，确保财务指标与战略愿景形成闭环 | [roles/financial-goal-planner.md](roles/financial-goal-planner.md) |
| customer-goal-planner | 规划客户维度目标，确保客户价值主张与市场定位匹配 | [roles/customer-goal-planner.md](roles/customer-goal-planner.md) |
| process-goal-planner | 规划流程维度目标，确保关键流程支撑客户价值交付 | [roles/process-goal-planner.md](roles/process-goal-planner.md) |
| growth-goal-planner | 规划成长维度目标，确保组织能力支撑战略执行 | [roles/growth-goal-planner.md](roles/growth-goal-planner.md) |
| bsc-integrator | 整合四维度目标，构建战略地图并验证因果关系链 | [roles/bsc-integrator.md](roles/bsc-integrator.md) |

## Files

| File | When to read |
|---|---|
| [workflow.md](workflow.md) | Before first dispatch — 了解完整执行流程 |
| [bind.md](bind.md) | When hitting limits — 了解资源约束和失败处理 |
| [roles/*.md](roles/) | Before dispatching each role — 了解角色职责和输出格式 |
| [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) | Startup — 确认依赖状态 |

## BSC Methodology Reference

本技能基于 Kaplan & Norton 的平衡计分卡方法论：

- **财务维度**：收入增长、成本降低、资产利用、风险管理
- **客户维度**：市场份额、客户获取、客户保留、客户满意度、客户盈利性
- **流程维度**：运营流程、客户管理流程、创新流程、法规与社会流程
- **成长维度**：人力资本、信息资本、组织资本

**因果关系链**：学习成长 → 流程改善 → 客户满意 → 财务结果

参考资源：https://www.balancedscorecard.org/bsc-basics-overview/

skills.name: video-storyboard-team
skills.display_name: 视频分镜架构团队技能
skills.short_desc:
视频分镜架构组，将脚本转化为镜头语言、构图建议与动作指令。
适用于商业片、动画片、广告片开拍前的专业分镜设计。
不适用于日常 VLog、纪录片或直播内容。
skills.detail_desc:
# video-storyboard-team

视频分镜架构组。将脚本转化为镜头语言、构图建议与动作指令。

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: 检查依赖** — 读取 [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) 并验证。
   报告缺失项：`required: true` = 没有它很可能失败；`required: false` = 功能降级但仍可用。**由用户决定**是否继续。
   本团队无外部依赖 — 所有角色基于内联角色知识运行。

1. **解析与分发** — Leader 解析用户脚本，识别场景结构、叙事目标、视觉风格。按顺序分发给镜头设计师。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Stage 1。

2. **顺序角色执行** — 镜头设计师 → 构图专家 → 动作指导，依次执行。每个角色接收前一角色的输出，产生结构化报告。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Stage 1-3。

3. **Leader 整合验证** — Leader 整合三个角色的输出，生成统一分镜脚本。并行验证镜头-构图-动作协调性，标注冲突和优化建议。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Stage 4。

4. **Final: 输出分镜文档** — Leader 输出完整分镜脚本、协调性验证报告、优化建议列表。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) § Final Report Format。

## Roles

| id | Purpose | When dispatched | Input | Key dependencies | Role file |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| shot-designer | 将脚本转化为镜头语言 | Stage 1，首先执行 | `{SCRIPT_SEGMENT}`, `{SCENE_CONTEXT}`, `{NARRATIVE_GOAL}` | none | [roles/shot-designer.md](roles/shot-designer.md) |
| composition-expert | 为每个镜头设计构图方案 | Stage 2，接收镜头序列 | `{SHOT_SEQUENCE}`, `{VISUAL_STYLE}` | shot-designer 输出 | [roles/composition-expert.md](roles/composition-expert.md) |
| action-director | 设计角色动作和场面调度 | Stage 3，接收镜头和构图 | `{SHOT_SEQUENCE}`, `{COMPOSITION_PLAN}`, `{CHARACTER_INFO}` | shot-designer + composition-expert 输出 | [roles/action-director.md](roles/action-director.md) |

> 在分发每个队友之前，读取对应的角色文件并提取
> `## Inline Persona for Teammate` 章节 — 直接粘贴到分发提示词中。
> 大多数采用代理不会自动加载角色文件。

## Files

| File | What it contains | When to read |
|---|---|---|
| [workflow.md](workflow.md) | Mermaid 图、详细步骤、整合规则、最终报告格式 | 首次分发前 — 完整执行手册 |
| [bind.md](bind.md) | 资源限制、行为约束、失败处理和降级模式 | 遇到限制、处理失败或需要降级模式规则时 |
| [roles/*.md](roles/) | 每个角色的身份、成功标准、输出 Schema、Inline Persona | 分发每个队友前 — 提取 Inline Persona |
| [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) | 运行所需的外部技能和工具 | **启动时** — 验证依赖，报告缺失项，用户决定是否继续 |

## WHAT

将脚本转化为完整的分镜设计，包括：
- **镜头语言**：镜头类型、运动方式、时长估算、剪辑节奏
- **构图建议**：画面布局、视觉焦点、深度层次、引导路径
- **动作指令**：角色动作、表演细节、场面调度、空间动线

## WHEN

适用于：
- 商业片开拍前的分镜设计
- 动画片分镜脚本制作
- 广告片镜头规划
- 短片/微电影前期筹备

## NOT

不适用于：
- 日常 VLog（过于简单，无需专业分镜）
- 纯纪录片（以真实记录为主，分镜设计空间有限）
- 直播内容（实时性要求，无法预先分镜）

## 灵感来源

电影分镜设计实战指南：https://www.studiobinder.com/blog/what-is-a-storyboard-definition-examples/

## 使用方式

```markdown
请使用 video-storyboard-team 为以下脚本生成分镜：

[脚本段落]

场景背景：[可选]
叙事目标：[可选]
视觉风格：[可选]
角色信息：[可选]
```

## 输出示例

```markdown
## 分镜脚本

### 场景 1：咖啡馆相遇

#### 镜头 #1：全景 | 固定 | 5秒 | 建立场景
- **构图**：三分法，主体位于右侧三分之一，背景层次分明
- **动作**：女主角从左侧入画，走向吧台，步伐轻快

#### 镜头 #2：中景 | 缓慢推进 | 3秒 | 引入主角
- **构图**：中心构图，焦点在女主角面部，背景虚化
- **动作**：女主角停步，环顾四周，眼神略过镜头

...

### 协调性验证
- ✅ 镜头-构图协调
- ✅ 构图-动作协调
- ✅ 镜头-动作协调

### 优化建议
- 镜头 #3 的推进速度可适当加快，以匹配女主角情绪变化
```

skills.name: gaokao-volunteer-planning-team
skills.short_desc:

WHEN: 志愿填报窗口期，需要综合评估而非单一「冲稳保」模板。
NOT: 仅提供分数线查询或单一维度推荐。
skills.detail_desc:
# Gaokao Volunteer Planning Team（高考志愿规划团队）

混合模式（B+C）团队：四个角色并行分析各自维度（分数线、专业、地域、就业），Leader整合后形成志愿方案。解决单一视角盲点问题——避免只看分数不看就业、只看专业不看地域的片面决策。

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: 信息核验** — 检查必需信息（省份、批次、分数/位次、科类）。缺失则进入交互式收集模式。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 0-1。

1. **并行分析: 四维度独立评估** — score-analyst、major-advisor、region-planner、career-projectionist 并行执行，各自输出维度报告。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 2。

2. **整合决策: 四维度协调** — Leader 检查各维度结论一致性，识别跨维度冲突，提供权衡建议。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 3。

3. **Final: 输出志愿填报方案** — 整合四维度分析，生成冲/稳/保三档院校方案，标注跨维度冲突。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 4。

## Roles

| id | Purpose | When dispatched | Input | Key dependencies | Role file |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| score-analyst | 分析分数线和录取概率 | 每次运行，与其他角色并行 | 考生分数、位次、省份、批次、目标院校列表 | curl, python | [roles/score-analyst.md](roles/score-analyst.md) |
| major-advisor | 评估专业选择 | 每次运行，与其他角色并行 | 考生兴趣方向、能力特点、职业倾向 | curl | [roles/major-advisor.md](roles/major-advisor.md) |
| region-planner | 规划地域选择 | 每次运行，与其他角色并行 | 考生地域偏好、家庭经济情况、专业方向 | curl | [roles/region-planner.md](roles/region-planner.md) |
| career-projectionist | 预测就业前景 | 每次运行，与其他角色并行 | 考生职业倾向、专业方向、风险偏好 | curl | [roles/career-projectionist.md](roles/career-projectionist.md) |

> Before dispatching each teammate, read the corresponding role file and extract the
> `## Inline Persona for Teammate` section — paste it directly into the dispatch prompt.
> Most adopting agents do NOT auto-load role files for teammates.

## Files

| File | What it contains | When to read |
|---|---|---|
| [workflow.md](workflow.md) | Mermaid流程图、详细步骤、质量门控、Final Report格式 | 首次调度前 — 完整执行协议 |
| [bind.md](bind.md) | 资源约束、行为约束、失败处理、降级模式 | 遇到限制或失败时 |
| [roles/*.md](roles/) | 角色身份、成功标准、输出格式、Inline Persona | 调度每个角色前 — 提取 Inline Persona |
| [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) | 外部技能和工具依赖 | **启动时** — 验证依赖，报告缺失项，用户决定是否继续 |

skills.detail_desc:
# 数据治理团队

该团队以“职责分离 + 质量门控”的方式协同完成复杂研究任务，避免单角色在关键判断上同时当运动员和裁判。每个角色只对本阶段产出负责，由 Leader 最终整合为可执行决策包。

## Workflow

0. **前置检查：验证依赖** — 读取 [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml)，确认依赖可用并标注缺失影响。
1. **domain-definer**：定义数据域边界与指标口径基线。
2. **lineage-auditor**：盘点关键链路血缘与断点风险。
3. **quality-rule-designer**：设计质量规则、阈值与告警策略。
4. **governance-operator**：输出责任矩阵与实施里程碑。
5. **Leader 组装最终交付** — 输出 **数据治理实施包**，包含结论、证据、风险与行动项。

## Roles

| id | 职责 | 何时派发 | 输入 | 关键依赖 | 角色文件 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| domain-definer | 定义数据域边界与指标口径基线。 | 阶段 1 | 任务简报 | data-governance, python | [roles/domain-definer.md](roles/domain-definer.md) |
| lineage-auditor | 盘点关键链路血缘与断点风险。 | 阶段 2 | 阶段 1 输出 | data-governance, python | [roles/lineage-auditor.md](roles/lineage-auditor.md) |
| quality-rule-designer | 设计质量规则、阈值与告警策略。 | 阶段 3 | 阶段 2 输出 | data-governance, python | [roles/quality-rule-designer.md](roles/quality-rule-designer.md) |
| governance-operator | 输出责任矩阵与实施里程碑。 | 阶段 4 | 阶段 3 输出 | data-governance, python | [roles/governance-operator.md](roles/governance-operator.md) |

> 派发每位队友前，请先读取对应角色文件中的 `## Inline Persona for Teammate` 段落，
> 并将其原样粘贴到派发提示词中。
> 大多数接入 Agent 不会自动加载角色文件。

## Files

| [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) | 运行所需技能与工具 | **启动时**（核对依赖并报告缺失，由用户决定是否继续） |

skills.name: export-control-compliance-team
skills.short_desc: 3角色并行出口管制审计团队，包含制裁分析师、出口策略师、合规官。可筛查制裁名单、确定ECCN分类、验证文档合规，适用于EAR/ITAR跨境技术出口合规评估。
skills.detail_desc:
# Export Control Compliance Team

This team uses parallel decomposition pattern to audit export control compliance across sanctions, classification, and legal requirements.

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: check dependencies** — read [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) and verify all items.

1. **Leader: gather context** — collect product specifications, destination countries, end-use information, and applicable export regulations.

2. **Parallel export control audit** — dispatch all three roles simultaneously:
   - **sanctions-analyst**: analyzes sanctions lists, identifies restricted parties
   - **export-strategist**: determines classification, evaluates licensing requirements
   - **legal-compliance-officer**: verifies legal compliance, validates documentation

3. **Leader: integrate findings** — collect outputs, compose by domain slice, identify cross-domain risks.

4. **Final: emit Export Control Compliance Report** — comprehensive report with sanctions, classification, and legal compliance findings.

## Roles

| id | Purpose | When dispatched | Input | Role file |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| sanctions-analyst | Analyzes sanctions lists | Every run, parallel | Destination countries, parties involved | [roles/sanctions-analyst.md](roles/sanctions-analyst.md) |
| export-strategist | Determines export classification | Every run, parallel | Product specs, destination countries | [roles/export-strategist.md](roles/export-strategist.md) |
| legal-compliance-officer | Verifies legal compliance | Every run, parallel | Export regulations, documentation | [roles/legal-compliance-officer.md](roles/legal-compliance-officer.md) |

## Files

| File | What it contains | When to read |

skills.name: short-video-production-swarm
skills.short_desc:
7-role short video production team ensuring character consistency, audiovisual completeness, requirement alignment, and platform-optimized publishing assets.
Use when producing short videos (15-60 seconds) where character drift, missing audiovisual elements, requirement drift, or single-perspective design cause quality failures.
Do NOT use for long-form video production (>60 seconds) or live-action video production requiring physical filming.
skills.detail_desc:
# Short Video Production Swarm

This team produces short videos (15-60 seconds) with a Mixed C + A pattern: Design Phase uses parallel adversarial review (requirement-analyst, script-planner, visual-designer see each other's outputs and cross-review from their professional perspectives), followed by Requirement Drift Check (requirement-analyst Phase 2 ensures outputs align with original brief), then Execution Phase sequential pipeline (video-producer → post-production-editor → quality-inspector → publishing-strategist with quality gates). The team solves four failure modes: (1) character drift across segments, (2) incomplete audiovisual elements (missing music/sound effects/subtitles), (3) requirement drift (outputs偏离原始需求), and (4) single-perspective design that misses cross-domain issues.

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: check dependencies** — read [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) and verify.
   Report missing items: `required: true` = likely fails without it; `required: false` = degraded but functional. **User decides** whether to proceed.
   The team can run on inline-persona-only mode if all skills are missing.
   Note: dependencies were populated during authoring via Stage 2 auto-matching (local scan) and optional post-generation community enrichment. Each entry's `source` field indicates origin (`local` or community URL).

1. **Design Phase: Multi-role Review** — requirement-analyst (Phase 1), script-planner, visual-designer run in parallel with mutual visibility. Each role produces their design document and cross-reviews others' outputs from their professional perspective. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 1 for quality gate (all mandatory sections filled, at least 1 cross-review comment from each role, no critical contradictions). See [bind.md](bind.md) for retry limits.

2. **Design Integration** — Leader integrates three design documents, resolves minor contradictions, surfaces unresolved disputes to user. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 2 for quality gate (integrated package contains all three documents, contradictions resolved or surfaced).

2.5. **Requirement Drift Check** — requirement-analyst (Phase 2) reviews script breakdown and visual style guide against original brief to identify gaps, assess impact, and recommend required changes. Checks narrative style, key message, duration, core梗元素, information density, brand exposure, visual style, tone, and platform constraints alignment. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 2.5 for quality gate (all alignment checks PASS, no critical gaps, verdict ALIGNED_PROCEED). If critical gaps found, kick back to script-planner or visual-designer for revision.

3. **Execution Handoff Message** — Leader sends execution handoff message containing final brief/script/visual guide file names with versions, resolved design decisions (character形态, 配色表, 成员数量, 批次策略), and any裁决结果. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 3 for format. Execution phase roles MUST pause if handoff message incomplete and request Leader to补充上下文.

4. **Video Generation (Two-stage)** — video-producer first generates image assets based on visual style guide, then uses reference-to-video generation to create longer, coherent videos. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 4 for quality gate (image assets generated, videos generated using references, character consistency verified, duration optimization applied). See [bind.md](bind.md) for drift handling rules.

5. **Post-Production** — post-production-editor combines segments, adds background music, sound effects, subtitles, and transitions. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 5 for quality gate (video segments combined, background music added, sound effects placed, subtitles integrated, audio balanced). See [bind.md](bind.md) for audiovisual completeness requirement.

6. **Quality Inspection** — quality-inspector verifies character consistency, audiovisual completeness, technical specs, and narrative coherence. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 6 for quality gate (all four dimensions PASS, no critical issues). See [bind.md](bind.md) for kick-back rules based on issue severity.

6.5. **Publishing Assets Generation** — publishing-strategist generates platform-optimized titles, captions, hashtags, and cover images based on final video and production context. See quality gate (at least one complete asset set per target platform, cover image aspect ratio matches platform requirements).

7. **Final: emit Video Delivery Report** — Leader compiles final delivery report with video location, publishing assets location, quality summary, and production notes. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Final Report Format for structure. Leader surfaces unresolved design contradictions verbatim, never mediates.

skills.name: db-migration-safety-team
skills.short_desc:
5-role pipeline (3 parallel DDL reviewers + consistency checker + rollback strategist) for safe database schema migrations.
Use when core business zero-downtime migration or sharding requires comprehensive DDL review, data verification, and rollback planning.
Do NOT use for local dev schema changes or single-table simple alterations.
skills.detail_desc:
# Database Migration Safety Team

A C+A mixed-pattern Teamskill that combines adversarial DDL review (Stage 1: 3 parallel reviewers) with a sequential pipeline for data verification (Stage 2) and rollback planning (Stage 3). Solves the failure mode where single-agent DDL review misses cross-domain risks (security + performance + business) and lacks systematic verification/rollback procedures.

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: check dependencies** — read [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) and verify.
   Report missing items: `required: true` = likely fails without it; `required: false` = degraded but functional. **User decides** whether to proceed.
   The team can run on inline-persona-only mode if all skills are missing.
   Note: dependencies were populated during authoring via Stage 2 auto-matching (local scan) and optional post-generation community enrichment. Each entry's `source` field indicates origin (`local` or community URL).

1. **Stage 1: DDL Adversarial Review** — Leader dispatches 3 parallel reviewers (ddl-security-auditor, ddl-performance-analyst, ddl-business-validator) with isolated execution. Each role independently evaluates DDL from their specialized perspective. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) for full step details and [bind.md](bind.md) § Behavioral Constraints for isolation rules.

2. **Stage 1 Gate: BLOCK verdict check** — If any role returns `BLOCK`, halt pipeline and surface BLOCK verdicts to user. Do NOT proceed to Stage 2. If no BLOCK, Leader integrates Stage 1 outputs and proceeds.

3. **Stage 2: Data Consistency Verification** — consistency-checker receives integrated Stage 1 verdicts and designs verification plan (row count, checksum, sample comparison). See [roles/consistency-checker.md](roles/consistency-checker.md) for verification methodology.

4. **Stage 2 Gate: GO verdict check** — If verdict is `NO-GO` or `NEEDS-ENHANCEMENT`, surface enhancement requests to user. Max 2 retries. If `GO`, proceed to Stage 3.

5. **Stage 3: Rollback Strategy Design** — rollback-strategist receives Stage 2 verification plan and designs rollback procedures with triggers, timeline, and irreversible ops analysis. See [roles/rollback-strategist.md](roles/rollback-strategist.md) for rollback methodology.

6. **Stage 3 Gate: GO verdict check** — If verdict is `NO-GO` or `NEEDS-ENHANCEMENT`, surface enhancement requests to user. Max 2 retries. If `GO`, proceed to Final.

7. **Final: emit Migration Safety Report** — Leader integrates all stage outputs into comprehensive report. Stage 1 contradictions surfaced verbatim (NOT mediated). See [workflow.md](workflow.md) § Final Report Format for output structure.

## Roles

| id | Purpose | When dispatched | Input | Key dependencies | Role file |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ddl-security-auditor | Security-first adversarial review of DDL | Stage 1 (parallel with performance-analyst, business-validator) | DDL statements, migration context | sql-injection-scanner | [roles/ddl-security-auditor.md](roles/ddl-security-auditor.md) |
| ddl-performance-analyst | Performance impact analysis of DDL | Stage 1 (parallel with security-auditor, business-validator) | DDL statements, migration context | sql-optimization | [roles/ddl-performance-analyst.md](roles/ddl-performance-analyst.md) |
| ddl-business-validator | Business and data integrity review | Stage 1 (parallel with security-auditor, performance-analyst) | DDL statements, migration context | data-integrity-guardian | [roles/ddl-business-validator.md](roles/ddl-business-validator.md) |
| consistency-checker | Design data verification procedures | Stage 2 (sequential, after Stage 1) | DDL, Stage 1 verdicts, migration context | data-migration-validator, python | [roles/consistency-checker.md](roles/consistency-checker.md) |
| rollback-strategist | Design rollback plan | Stage 3 (sequential, after Stage 2) | DDL, Stage 1 verdicts, Stage 2 plan, migration context | migration | [roles/rollback-strategist.md](roles/rollback-strategist.md) |

skills.name: frontend-performance-team
skills.short_desc:
3-role parallel decomposition team (First-Screen Analyst + Resource Optimizer + Runtime Bottleneck Auditor) for diagnosing SPA performance issues across loading, resources, and runtime dimensions.
Use when 中大型 SPA 应用加载慢或运行时卡顿，需要系统性性能诊断。
Do NOT use for 简单静态页面或单一性能问题（如仅查 bundle 大小）。
skills.detail_desc:
# 前端性能攻坚组

基于 Google Web Vitals 指标的 3 角色并行性能诊断团队。采用 Pattern B (Parallel decomposition) 模式——三个专家并行分析不同性能维度，Leader 整合报告并按优先级排序。解决单角色分析时遗漏跨维度关联问题、无法同时覆盖加载/资源/运行时三个层面的失败模式。

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: check dependencies** — read [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) and verify.
   报告缺失项：`required: true` = 可能失败；`required: false` = 降级但可用。**用户决定**是否继续。
   团队可在无依赖情况下运行（基于用户提供的数据进行分析）。

1. **Leader: Context preparation** — 解析用户输入，判断输入规模，为三个角色准备 dispatch prompt。
   输入完整度 ≥ 70% 时继续，否则向用户请求补充信息。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 1。

2. **Parallel analysis: three experts** — first-screen-analyst / resource-optimizer / runtime-bottleneck-auditor 并行运行。
   每个角色独立分析其专属维度，按 Output Schema 输出结构化报告。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 2。

3. **Leader: Integrate and prioritize** — 收集三个角色报告，合并优化建议，按优先级排序，标注跨维度关联问题。
   详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 3。

4. **Final: emit Performance Report** — 输出包含整体评估、P0/P1/P2 问题、Coverage Map 的完整报告。
   Leader 保留每个角色的原始 Verdict，不修改判断。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 4。

## Roles

| first-screen-analyst | 分析首屏加载性能（LCP/FID/CLS）和关键渲染路径阻塞点 | 每次运行，与其他角色并行 | 应用描述 + 性能数据 + 技术栈 | webperf-core-web-vitals (可选) | [roles/first-screen-analyst.md](roles/first-screen-analyst.md) |
| resource-optimizer | 分析静态资源体积和加载策略 | 每次运行，与其他角色并行 | 应用描述 + 构建产物信息 + 技术栈 | webpack-expert (可选), ast-analyzer (可选) | [roles/resource-optimizer.md](roles/resource-optimizer.md) |
| runtime-bottleneck-auditor | 分析运行时性能瓶颈 | 每次运行，与其他角色并行 | 应用描述 + 运行时问题描述 + 技术栈 | detecting-memory-leaks (可选), ast-analyzer (可选) | [roles/runtime-bottleneck-auditor.md](roles/runtime-bottleneck-auditor.md) |

skills.name: meeting-minutes-synthesizer-team
skills.short_desc:
会议纪要精炼组：基于速记稿并行提取决策项、待办任务、核心争议，按麦肯锡金字塔原理综合输出结构化纪要。
Use when 需要从冗长的录音转录或杂乱的会议笔记中快速沉淀可执行的结论。
Do NOT use for 简单的全文听写或逐字转录——本技能聚焦信息精炼而非复制。
skills.detail_desc:
# 会议纪要精炼组 (Meeting Minutes Synthesizer Team)

本 Teamskill 采用 **B+C 混合模式**（并行分解 → 流程整合），解决单 Agent 在会议纪要精炼中的信息分类模糊问题：同一段内容可能同时被判定为"决策"、"待办"或"争议"，单 Agent 无法确保分类的一致性和专业性。三角色并行提取后综合整合，确保信息分类的独立性、完整性和可追溯性。

## Workflow

0. **预检：检查依赖项** — 读取 [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) 并验证。
   本 Teamskill 无外部依赖，四个角色均为纯推理任务。用户确认是否继续。

1. **并行提取阶段** — 三角色（decision-extractor / action-extractor / controversy-extractor）同时启动，分别按麦肯锡标准提取决策项、待办任务、争议点。角色间隔离，不相互看到输出。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 1。

2. **整合分发** — Leader 收集三提取结果，检查完整性，分发给 minutes-synthesizer。若任一提取员返回空结果，需在分发时明确标注。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 2。

3. **综合输出阶段** — minutes-synthesizer 按麦肯锡金字塔原理综合三源信息，输出结构化纪要（会议概要 → 核心决策 → 待办事项 → 未决争议 → 附录）。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 3。

4. **最终报告** — Leader 检查纪要完整性，向用户交付会议纪要精炼报告。报告包含完整纪要、提取统计、完整性判定和建议。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 4。

## Roles

| id | Purpose | When dispatched | Input | Key dependencies | Role file |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| decision-extractor | 提取明确决议，区分决议与讨论 | 每次运行，并行启动 | 会议速记稿全文 | 无 | [roles/decision-extractor.md](roles/decision-extractor.md) |
| action-extractor | 提取待办任务，区分待办与决策 | 每次运行，并行启动 | 会议速记稿全文 | 无 | [roles/action-extractor.md](roles/action-extractor.md) |
| controversy-extractor | 提取未解决争议，区分争议与讨论 | 每次运行，并行启动 | 会议速记稿全文 | 无 | [roles/controversy-extractor.md](roles/controversy-extractor.md) |
| minutes-synthesizer | 综合三源信息，输出结构化纪要 | 三提取完成后启动 | 三提取结果 + 会议元信息 | 无 | [roles/minutes-synthesizer.md](roles/minutes-synthesizer.md) |

> 分发每个队友前，读取对应角色文件并提取 `## Inline Persona for Teammate` 部分 — 直接粘贴到分发提示中。
> 大多数采用 Agent 不会自动为队友加载角色文件。

## Files

| File | What it contains | When to read |
|---|---|---|
| [workflow.md](workflow.md) | Mermaid 流程图、步骤协议、质量门、最终报告格式 | 首次分发前 — 完整执行手册 |
| [bind.md](bind.md) | 资源约束、行为约束、失败处理、降级模式 | 遇到限制、处理失败、需要降级规则时 |
| [roles/\*.md](roles/) | 角色身份、成功标准、输出 Schema、Inline Persona | 分发每个队友前 — 提取 Inline Persona |
| [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) | 外部技能和工具依赖 | **启动时** — 验证依赖，报告缺失项，用户决定是否继续 |

skills.name: db-query-tuning-team
skills.short_desc:
4-role database query tuning team (3 parallel analysts + 1 synthesizer) that diagnoses slow queries, interprets execution plans, and proposes index restructuring.
Use when database CPU is high or business APIs respond slowly due to query performance issues.
Do NOT use for simple CRUD syntax writing or schema design tasks.
skills.detail_desc:
# Database Query Tuning Team

A 4-role B+C mixed pattern team that diagnoses database query performance bottlenecks and delivers actionable tuning recommendations. Three parallel analysts (Slow Query Analyzer, Execution Plan Reader, Index Refactor Advisor) work independently on disjoint slices of the problem space, then the Tuning Synthesizer integrates their findings into a prioritized action plan.

This team solves the failure mode where a single agent analyzing query performance either misses cross-domain insights (log patterns vs execution paths vs index design) or produces fragmented recommendations without implementation sequencing.

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: check dependencies** — read [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) and verify `sql-optimization` skill availability.
   Report missing items: `required: false` = degraded but functional (roles can operate on LLM knowledge alone). **User decides** whether to proceed.
   The team can run on inline-persona-only mode if the skill is missing.

1. **Parallel Analysis Phase** — Leader dispatches 3 analysts in parallel:
   - **slow-query-analyzer** receives slow query log content → identifies top slow queries, computes impact scores, flags index candidates
   - **execution-plan-reader** receives EXPLAIN output → diagnoses access types, index usage, JOIN inefficiencies, Extra warnings
   - **index-refactor-advisor** receives index candidates + execution issues → proposes index restructuring with DDL, evaluates write cost
   
   See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 1 for quality gates (all 3 outputs must have Verdict field).

2. **Integration Phase** — Leader collects outputs from Step 1, verifies at least 2 of 3 valid, prepares consolidated findings package.
   See [bind.md](bind.md) § Failure Handling for degraded mode when analysts fail.

3. **Synthesis Phase** — Leader dispatches **tuning-synthesizer** with all integrated findings → produces prioritized action plan (Immediate/Staged/Monitoring tiers).
   See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 3 for quality gates (all 3 tiers must be present).

4. **Final: emit Tuning Report** — Leader composes final report with executive summary, root cause diagnosis, action plan, supporting evidence, expected outcomes, and verdict.
   See [workflow.md](workflow.md) § Final Report Format for the complete template.

## Roles

| id | Purpose | When dispatched | Input | Key dependencies | Role file |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| slow-query-analyzer | Analyze slow query logs to identify top offenders | Parallel with execution-plan-reader and index-refactor-advisor | slow_query_log, threshold_ms | sql-optimization | [roles/slow-query-analyzer.md](roles/slow-query-analyzer.md) |
| execution-plan-reader | Interpret EXPLAIN output to diagnose execution paths | Parallel with slow-query-analyzer and index-refactor-advisor | explain_output, queries_context | sql-optimization | [roles/execution-plan-reader.md](roles/execution-plan-reader.md) |
| index-refactor-advisor | Propose index restructuring with DDL and cost evaluation | Parallel with slow-query-analyzer and execution-plan-reader | index_candidates, execution_issues, existing_indexes, table_stats | sql-optimization | [roles/index-refactor-advisor.md](roles/index-refactor-advisor.md) |
| tuning-synthesizer | Integrate findings into prioritized action plan | After Integration Phase completes (Step 2) | slow_query_findings, execution_plan_findings, index_refactor_findings, business_context | none | [roles/tuning-synthesizer.md](roles/tuning-synthesizer.md) |

skills.name: openapi-sync-audit-team
skills.short_desc:
WHAT: 4-role parallel audit team that validates OpenAPI specification sync with code implementation across endpoint coverage, parameter types, response structure, and version consistency.
Use when frontend-backend collaboration is broken due to outdated or inaccurate API documentation.
Do NOT use for internal personal projects or single-endpoint quick checks.
skills.detail_desc:
# OpenAPI Sync Audit Team

A 4-role parallel audit team (B + A mixed pattern) that validates OpenAPI specification synchronization with code implementation. Each auditor examines a disjoint slice of the API contract: endpoint coverage, parameter types, response structure, and version consistency. The team surfaces contradictions verbatim without mediation — resolution is the human user's call.

This team solves the **adversarial blind spot** failure mode: a single agent reviewing API docs tends to converge on "looks mostly correct" and misses specific contract violations that frontend developers will encounter at runtime. Parallel specialized auditors with forced disjoint focus areas prevent this convergence.

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: check dependencies** — read [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) and verify `python` is available (required for OpenAPI parsing). Report missing items: `required: true` = likely fails without it; `required: false` = degraded but functional. **User decides** whether to proceed. The team can run on inline-persona-only mode if all skills are missing.

1. **Parallel Audit Execution** — Leader dispatches 4 auditors in parallel with their Inline Personas. Each auditor receives `{CODEBASE_PATH}`, `{OPENAPI_SPEC_PATH}`, and optional framework hints. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) for full dispatch details and input placeholders.

2. **Leader Integration** — Leader collects all 4 audit outputs, aggregates CRITICAL/WARNING/INFO findings across dimensions, identifies cross-role contradictions, and computes overall sync status from individual verdicts. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) § Step 2 for integration logic.

3. **Final: emit OpenAPI Sync Audit Report** — Leader produces the Final Report with tiered findings, coverage map, and overall verdict. Leader surfaces contradictions verbatim, never mediates. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) § Final Report Format.

## Roles

| id | Purpose | When dispatched | Input | Key dependencies | Role file |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| endpoint-coverage-auditor | Enumerate endpoints, flag coverage gaps | Every run, parallel with other auditors | `{CODEBASE_PATH}`, `{OPENAPI_SPEC_PATH}`, `{FRAMEWORK_TYPE}` | ast-analyzer, python | [roles/endpoint-coverage-auditor.md](roles/endpoint-coverage-auditor.md) |
| param-type-auditor | Validate parameter type contract | Every run, parallel with other auditors | `{CODEBASE_PATH}`, `{OPENAPI_SPEC_PATH}`, `{ENDPOINT_FILTER}` | ast-analyzer, python | [roles/param-type-auditor.md](roles/param-type-auditor.md) |
| response-structure-auditor | Validate response field contract | Every run, parallel with other auditors | `{CODEBASE_PATH}`, `{OPENAPI_SPEC_PATH}`, `{ENDPOINT_FILTER}` | ast-analyzer, python | [roles/response-structure-auditor.md](roles/response-structure-auditor.md) |
| version-consistency-auditor | Validate version metadata alignment | Every run, parallel with other auditors | `{CODEBASE_PATH}`, `{OPENAPI_SPEC_PATH}`, `{CHANGELOG_PATH}` | python, git | [roles/version-consistency-auditor.md](roles/version-consistency-auditor.md) |

> Before dispatching each teammate, read the corresponding role file and extract the
> `## Inline Persona for Teammate` section — paste it directly into the dispatch prompt.
> Most adopting agents do NOT auto-load role files for teammates.

## Files

skills.name: api-pentest-team
skills.short_desc:
WHAT: 4-role adversarial API penetration test team (Auth Attacker + Injection Hunter + Config Auditor + Attack Chain Synthesizer) that surfaces isolated vulnerabilities and constructs exploit chains.
Use when auditing public APIs before release or during annual security reviews.
Do NOT use for live production testing without authorization, or as a substitute for professional red team penetration testing.
skills.detail_desc:
# API Penetration Test Team

A 4-role adversarial team that simulates attack scenarios to find authorization vulnerabilities, injection points, and misconfigurations in APIs. The team follows OWASP API Security Top 10 methodology and constructs attack chains from isolated findings. This solves the adversarial blind spot where a single agent converges on similar conclusions — different attack perspectives surface different vulnerabilities, and chain synthesis reveals exploit paths that isolated findings miss.

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: check dependencies** — read [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) and verify.
   Report missing items: `required: true` = likely fails without it; `required: false` = degraded but functional. **User decides** whether to proceed.
   The team can run on inline-persona-only mode if all skills are missing.
   Note: dependencies were populated during authoring via Stage 2 auto-matching (local scan) and optional post-generation community enrichment. Each entry's `source` field indicates origin (`local` or community URL).

1. **Leader: Prepare attack context** — parse API spec, build input field inventory, identify integration points. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) Step 1 for full details.

2. **Parallel adversarial attack** — dispatch auth-attacker, injection-hunter, config-auditor in parallel (isolated, no cross-visibility). Each role tests their assigned OWASP categories. See [bind.md](bind.md) § Behavioral Constraints for isolation rules.

3. **Leader: Collect findings** — parse outputs against each role's Output Schema, aggregate for synthesis.

4. **Attack chain synthesis** — attack-chain-synthesizer constructs exploit paths from combined findings, identifies hidden critical combinations.

5. **Final: emit API Penetration Test Report** — integrate all findings and attack chains. Leader surfaces contradictions verbatim, never mediates. See [workflow.md](workflow.md) § Final Report Format.

## Roles

| id | Purpose | When dispatched | Input | Key dependencies | Role file |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| auth-attacker | Test authorization bypasses (BOLA, broken auth, function-level auth) | Step 2 (parallel with injection-hunter, config-auditor) | API_SPEC, AUTH_MECH, SAMPLE_REQUESTS | api-security, curl, python | [roles/auth-attacker.md](roles/auth-attacker.md) |
| injection-hunter | Test injection vulnerabilities (SQL, NoSQL, SSRF, command) | Step 2 (parallel with auth-attacker, config-auditor) | API_SPEC, INPUT_FIELDS, EXTERNAL_INTEGRATIONS | sql-injection-scanner, curl, python | [roles/injection-hunter.md](roles/injection-hunter.md) |
| config-auditor | Audit misconfigurations, resource limits, sensitive flows | Step 2 (parallel with auth-attacker, injection-hunter) | API_SPEC, CONFIG_CHECKLIST, OBSERVED_RESPONSES | misconfig, curl, python | [roles/config-auditor.md](roles/config-auditor.md) |
| attack-chain-synthesizer | Synthesize findings into attack chains | Step 4 (after all attackers complete) | Aggregated findings from all 3 attackers | none | [roles/attack-chain-synthesizer.md](roles/attack-chain-synthesizer.md) |

> Before dispatching each teammate, read the corresponding role file and extract the
> `## Inline Persona for Teammate` section — paste it directly into the dispatch prompt.
> Most adopting agents do NOT auto-load role files for teammates.

## Files

| File | What it contains | When to read |

skills.name: contract-review-helper-team
skills.short_desc: 面向法务与商务场景的合同审查辅助工具。采用多 Agent 协作模式（Agent Team），支持条款提取、法律风险标注、商务风险提示、版本比对分析及 Markdown 报告生成。旨在通过工程化协作提升审查效率，前置结构化工作，辅助专业人员决策。
skills.detail_desc:
# 合同审查辅助 (Contract Review Helper)

5 角色混合 C+A（专业化流水线 + 对抗性并行审查）Team Skill，面向法务/商务人员，辅助合同条款提取、法律与商务风险标注、合同版本比对，并生成 Markdown 审查报告。本团队解决的核心问题是：**单一 AI agent 无法同时扮演法律审查和商务审查角色而不产生趋同判断**——通过将两个角色隔离并行运行，保留各自独立视角，确保矛盾观点被发现而非被掩盖。

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: check dependencies** — 读取 [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) 并验证可用性。报告缺失项，由用户决定 go/no-go。Agent 不做自动决策。团队可在无技能依赖的模式下运行（inline-persona-only mode）。

1. **条款提取** — 条款提取专员接收合同原文，逐条款提取结构化信息。输出条款清单。**质量门**：输出非空。

2. **法律与商务风险标注（并行对抗）** — 法律风险审查官和商务风险审查官**并行、隔离**地接收同一个条款清单，分别进行风险分析。两人互不可见对方输出。这是本团队的核心差异化价值——对抗性视角的独立性。**质量门**：两个角色都返回了格式正确的输出。

3. **版本比对（可选）** — 如用户提供两个版本，版本比对专员执行逐条款差异分析。跳过条件：单一版本。**质量门**：有差异输出（或明确两个版本一致）。

4. **报告整合** — 报告整合官收集所有上游输出，生成 Markdown 最终报告。执行交叉一致性检查，法律与商务的分歧如实呈现在"矛盾观点登记"章节，不做任何调和。**质量门**：报告包含所有章节和免责声明。

5. **输出** — Leader 交付最终报告，对矛盾观点提请用户人工裁决。详见 [workflow.md](workflow.md) 完整流程。

## Roles

| ID | Purpose | When dispatched | Input | Key dependencies | Role file |
|----|---------|----------------|-------|----------------|-----------|
| `clause-extractor` | 提取合同所有条款的结构化信息 | Step 1（流水线） | 合同原文全文 | — | [roles/clause-extractor.md](roles/clause-extractor.md) |
| `legal-risk-reviewer` | 法律合规与可执行性风险审查 | Step 2a（并行对抗） | 条款清单 | — | [roles/legal-risk-reviewer.md](roles/legal-risk-reviewer.md) |
| `business-risk-reviewer` | 商业利益与运营可行性审查 | Step 2b（并行对抗） | 条款清单 | — | [roles/business-risk-reviewer.md](roles/business-risk-reviewer.md) |
| `version-comparer` | 逐条款版本差异分析 | Step 3（条件执行） | 旧版+新版全文 | — | [roles/version-comparer.md](roles/version-comparer.md) |
| `report-synthesizer` | 整合输出为 Markdown 报告 | Step 4（串行整合） | 以上所有输出 | — | [roles/report-synthesizer.md](roles/report-synthesizer.md) |

> **重要：** 在调度每个队友前，必须阅读对应角色的 role 文件并提取 `## Inline Persona for Teammate` 章节，直接粘贴到调度 prompt 中。大多数 adopting agent 不会自动加载角色文件。

# 能量管理专家

这个3角色并行分析同时优化能量的三个独立维度：生理能量（营养、运动、睡眠）、心理能量（动机、意义、专注）、环境支持（时间、流程、社交）。并行工作防止单维度解决方案（比如只关注睡眠却忽视工作意义）。

## 工作流程

0. **前置检查** — 确认依赖项 [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml)
1. **并行分析** — 三个角色同时独立工作：

   - **身体能量分析师**: 评估营养、运动、睡眠、恢复
   - **心理能量设计师**: 评估动机、意义、专注、情绪调节
   - **环境优化师**: 评估时间管理、工作流程、社交环境
     输出：三份独立分析报告
2. **整合分析** — 综合三个维度，识别冲突和协同
3. **统一能量优化方案** — 跨维度的能量提升计划
4. **最终交付** — 完整的能量管理包

This team performs adversarial cybersecurity law audits using two independent perspectives: legal risk assessment and technical compliance verification. The adversarial pattern ensures blind spots are surfaced—each role critiques the system without seeing the other's findings.

## Workflow

0. **Pre-flight: check dependencies** — read [dependencies.yaml](dependencies.yaml) and verify all items are available. Report results to the user.

1. **Leader: gather context** — collect platform architecture, security policies, data handling procedures, and target market regulations. Distribute identical context to both roles.

2. **Parallel adversarial audit** — dispatch both roles simultaneously:
   - **legal-risk-assessor**: assesses legal risks under cyber laws, identifies regulatory requirements

3. **Leader: integrate findings** — collect both role outputs, surface contradictions verbatim, categorize by compliance domain.

4. **Final: emit Cybersecurity Law Compliance Report** — structured report with legal risks, technical gaps, and surfaced contradictions.
